button.description:
### 🗺️ Mapping des Tokens

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background | --component-button-bg | → --semantic-color-bg-primary | default |
| background | --component-button-bg-hover | → --semantic-color-bg-primary-hover | :hover |
| background | --component-button-bg-active | → --semantic-color-bg-primary-active | :active |
| background | --component-button-bg-disabled | → --semantic-color-bg-disabled | :disabled |
| color | --component-button-color | → --semantic-color-text-on-primary | default |
| color | --component-button-color-disabled | → --semantic-color-text-disabled | :disabled |
| border-color | --component-button-border-color | → --semantic-color-border-default | default |
| outline-color | --component-button-focus-ring | → --semantic-color-border-emphasis | :focus-visible |
| padding-block | --component-button-padding-block | → --semantic-spacing-md | all |
| padding-inline | --component-button-padding-inline | → --semantic-spacing-lg | all |
| border-radius | --component-button-radius | → --semantic-radius-md | all |
| font-size | --component-button-font-size | → --semantic-typography-body-size | all |
| font-weight | --component-button-font-weight | → --semantic-typography-body-weight-bold | all |
| gap | --component-button-gap | → --semantic-spacing-sm | all |
| background | --component-button-secondary-bg | → --semantic-color-bg-secondary | default (secondary) |
| background | --component-button-ghost-bg | → --semantic-color-bg-transparent | default (ghost) |
| color | --component-button-ghost-color | → --semantic-color-text-primary | default (ghost) |
| background | --component-button-destructive-bg | → --semantic-color-bg-danger | default (destructive) |

input.description:
### 🗺️ Mapping des Tokens

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| background | --component-input-bg | var(--semantic-color-surface-default) | default |
| background | --component-input-bg-disabled | var(--semantic-color-surface-muted) | :disabled |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color | var(--semantic-color-border-default) | default |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-hover | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :hover |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-focus | var(--semantic-color-border-focus) | :focus-visible |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-error | var(--semantic-color-border-danger) | error |
| border-color | --component-input-border-color-disabled | var(--semantic-color-border-muted) | :disabled |
| border-width | --component-input-border-width | var(--semantic-border-width-default) | all |
| border-radius | --component-input-border-radius | var(--semantic-border-radius-md) | all |
| color (text) | --component-input-color-text | var(--semantic-color-text-default) | default |
| color (text) | --component-input-color-text-placeholder | var(--semantic-color-text-placeholder) | placeholder |
| color (text) | --component-input-color-text-disabled | var(--semantic-color-text-disabled) | :disabled |
| color (label) | --component-input-color-label | var(--semantic-color-text-secondary) | default |
| color (helper) | --component-input-color-helper | var(--semantic-color-text-tertiary) | default |
| color (helper error) | --component-input-color-helper-error | var(--semantic-color-text-danger) | error |
| outline | --component-input-outline-focus | var(--semantic-color-border-emphasis) | :focus-visible |
| outline-offset | --component-input-outline-offset | var(--semantic-outline-offset-default) | :focus-visible |
| padding-inline | --component-input-padding-x | var(--semantic-spacing-md) | all |
| padding-block | --component-input-padding-y | var(--semantic-spacing-sm) | all |
| gap (icon+input) | --component-input-gap | var(--semantic-spacing-xs) | all |
| font-size | --component-input-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-size) | all |
| font-family | --component-input-font-family | var(--semantic-typography-font-family-base) | all |
| line-height | --component-input-line-height | var(--semantic-typography-body-md-line-height) | all |
| font-size (label) | --component-input-label-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-label-sm-size) | all |
| font-weight (label) | --component-input-label-font-weight | var(--semantic-typography-font-weight-medium) | all |
| font-size (helper) | --component-input-helper-font-size | var(--semantic-typography-body-sm-size) | all |
| min-width | --component-input-min-width | var(--semantic-sizing-input-min) | all |
| height | --component-input-height | var(--semantic-sizing-input-height-md) | default |
| height (sm) | --component-input-height-sm | var(--semantic-sizing-input-height-sm) | size=sm |
| height (lg) | --component-input-height-lg | var(--semantic-sizing-input-height-lg) | size=lg |
| opacity | --semantic-state-disabled-opacity | 0.5 | :disabled |
| transition | --component-input-transition | var(--semantic-motion-duration-fast) | all |

| outline | --semantic-color-border-emphasis | — | :focus-visible |
| opacity | — | 0.5 | :disabled |
| cursor | — | not-allowed | :disabled |

| Propriété CSS | Token | Résolu | État |
|---|---|---|---|
| font-family | --semantic-typography-heading-h1-font-family | → typography.heading.h1.fontFamily | ✅ |
